title: Languages and Communication Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Using few words to say something clearly.
choices: concise
zeal
allot
rounds.answer: concise
rounds.explanation: concise: Using few words to say something clearly.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Seeming reasonable or likely to be true.
choices: concise
zeal
plausible
rounds.answer: plausible
rounds.explanation: plausible: Seeming reasonable or likely to be true.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Easily tricked because you believe what people say.
choices: zeal
gullible
concise
rounds.answer: gullible
rounds.explanation: gullible: Easily tricked because you believe what people say.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A structure used to block people or vehicles from passing.
rounds.answer: barricade

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Seeming reasonable or likely to be true.
rounds.answer: plausible

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Easily tricked because you believe what people say.
rounds.answer: gullible

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The protesters built a barricade across the road using old crates.
Look up the definition of any word you do not know.
There was dissent among the students about the new school uniform.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Having mild or moderate weather; not too hot or too cold.
Seeming reasonable or likely to be true.
To learn and understand new information and make it part of your knowledge.
To make someone familiar with something through repeated experience.
rounds.answer: To make someone familiar with something through repeated experience.
rounds.explanation: It took me a while to accustom myself to waking up early.

choices: A small argument about something unimportant.
Having mild or moderate weather; not too hot or too cold.
Seeming reasonable or likely to be true.
The act of refusing to obey someone or something.
rounds.answer: A small argument about something unimportant.
rounds.explanation: They had a quibble about which film to watch but quickly agreed.

choices: Disagreement or difference of opinion.
Seeming reasonable or likely to be true.
The act of refusing to obey someone or something.
To learn and understand new information and make it part of your knowledge.
rounds.answer: To learn and understand new information and make it part of your knowledge.
rounds.explanation: When you move to a new place, it takes time to assimilate into the culture.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: The protesters built a barricade across the road using old crates.
Look up the definition of any word you do not know.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The dark clouds warned of an impending storm.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We had a spontaneous celebration when we heard the good news.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The government placed an embargo on certain imported goods.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'dissent' mean in this unit?
choices: Disagreement or difference of opinion.
Using few words to say something clearly.
A strong feeling of enthusiasm and eagerness.
rounds.answer: Disagreement or difference of opinion.
rounds.explanation: dissent: Disagreement or difference of opinion.

rounds.prompt: What does 'conscientious' mean in this unit?
choices: Using few words to say something clearly.
A strong feeling of enthusiasm and eagerness.
Careful and thorough; paying attention to doing things well.
rounds.answer: Careful and thorough; paying attention to doing things well.
rounds.explanation: conscientious: Careful and thorough; paying attention to doing things well.

rounds.prompt: What does 'zeal' mean in this unit?
choices: To give or set aside a certain amount for a specific purpose.
A strong feeling of enthusiasm and eagerness.
Using few words to say something clearly.
rounds.answer: A strong feeling of enthusiasm and eagerness.
rounds.explanation: zeal: A strong feeling of enthusiasm and eagerness.
